title: 260 PCS Construction Race Tracks for Kids Toys, 2 Electric Cars, 4 Construction Cars, 1 Map & Flexible DIY Track Set, Engineering Presents for 3 4 5 6 Year Old Boys Girls
features: 【What 260 pieces includes】Our construction toy includes 240 flexible track components, 2 racing cars, 4 mini construction trucks, 8 traffic signs, 2 trees and 1 bridge, 1 barricade, 2 batteries, 1 map. Advanced setup to build your own construction kingdom for your little one!

【6 Different Types of Construction Vehicles】 We have configured 6 simulated construction vehicles with unique designs and features. Features a transport truck, excavator, steamroller, cement truck and 2 race cars. The perfect presents for 3 4 5 6 year old boys and girls.

【More Accessories, More Play】 Cars can cross bridges and track pieces can be bent and broken to form a variety of different track shapes. Each truck has movable working arms. Kids can pretend to use these trucks for all kinds of construction jobs and spend hours playing creatively and imaginatively.

【Creare Your Own Path 】Using Y-tracks, arc tracks, and bridges, this STEM building toy can help your child use their imagination and build their own world of tracks Be well-rounded, limit time screensavers, and take the time to play convenient and healthy games.

【Safety & Details Frist 】Complies with European toy standards. Made from non-toxic materials, safety always comes first. Each building track is uniquely designed to fit perfectly in the child's hand, easy to carry, in the pocket to play anywhere, perfect presents for the little ones on Christmas, Easter, birthday and other holidays.
description: Product Description Do you want to help your little car lover play endlessly? Kizplay's Upgrade Construction Engineering Race Track Toy for Boys is just what you've been looking for! Compared with other suppliers, we have designed a unique 260 PCS technology-themed racing track and equipped 6 cars (2 racing cars + 4 mini construction trucks) for children to play. Such a set of highly configured track engineering toys for 2 3 4 5 6 year old boys will definitely surprise your kids! Children's playroom is not complete without a set of car toys. These building toys for boys can not only satisfy children's car obsession, but also be an interesting decoration. In addition, it can also be placed in the bedroom, living room, playroom, school, and outdoor for children to play, which is very convenient to carry. Show your child's imagination and learn by building a road with 240 tracks and 1 bridge. You and your child can use imagination to create a variety of unique tracks and then let the car roll over them. It makes technical games more attractive and fun to exercise children's hands-on coordination skills and improve their imagination. presents for Tech Lovers Kizplay's engineering racing tracks have exquisite packaging, contain 6 PCS engineering cars and flexible track set, creating engineering street presents for 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 year old boys girls. 2 cool electric toy cars with battery High quality materials and exquisite design car 4 toy cars 4 mini toy cars, the joints of each car are adjustable Different road sign With the different road sign, children can play happier and bring more fun to children A variety of ways to play can bring more fun to children The 260-piece set of railcar toys can give children more choices A variety of combinations can not only exercise children's hands-on ability, but also enhance children's creativity and imagination
